title: Accounting Associate
description: General Mills is a global manufacturer and marketer of branded consumer foods with 100+ years of heritage. You'll support our finance organization with accuracy and attention to detail.
responsibilities: Process accounts payable and receivable transactions with accuracy
Reconcile bank statements and general ledger accounts
Support monthly close procedures and journal entry preparation
Assist with internal and external audits
Maintain accurate financial records in ERP systems
Resolve discrepancies and support process improvements

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Accounting or Bachelor's degree in Accounting/Finance
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of accounting or bookkeeping experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
